title: Homelife for easy living Coral X-15 1200w Dry Iron/Non-stick Soleplate/Variable Temperature Control / 2m Long Cord / E7051 / White
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: NON-STICK SOLEPLATE: With a non-stick soleplate, the iron glides easily over fabrics and doesn't stick, so there's no worry about damaging garments.

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL DIAL: Using the dial, choose from the cotton, linen, wool and silk settings or set your own temperature to get the perfect finish every time. The red pilot lamp will turn off to indicate the correct temperature has been reached.
LONG 2M CORD: Simply connect the power cord to a suitable 220-240v~50Hz mains socket to operate the iron. The long 2m cord is ideal for easy manoeuvring.
ERGONOMIC HANDLE: The comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and control over the iron during use.
